title: Customer service call
explanation:
Customer service call

Listen to a customer calling about a delayed order.

Transcript

Agent: Good morning, BrightHome customer service. How can I help?
Customer: Hello. I ordered a desk last week, and it was supposed to arrive yesterday.
Agent: Let me check that for you. I can see there was a delivery problem at the warehouse.
Customer: I understand, but I need the desk urgently because I work from home.
Agent: I am sorry. We can deliver it tomorrow and refund the delivery charge.

questions.feedback: The order was for a desk.

questions.text: It was supposed to arrive [*yesterday|last week|tomorrow].
The company offers to refund the [*delivery charge|whole order|tax].

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The customer needs the desk because they work from ____.  | *home | school | abroad
questions.feedback: They say they work from home.

questions.text: The agent says: Let me ____ that for you. | *check | buy | cancel
There was a delivery ____.  | *problem | discount | presentation
The desk can be delivered ____.  | *tomorrow | next month | today
The customer sounds [*firm but polite|rude|completely relaxed].
questions.feedback: The complaint is polite but clear.

questions.text: The agent responds by [*offering a solution|ending the call|denying the order].
questions.feedback: A new delivery time and refund are offered.

questions.text: The main topic is [*an online order delay|a job interview|a train ticket].
questions.feedback: It is a customer service problem.

questions.text: The company accepts [*some responsibility|no responsibility|full blame for damage].
questions.feedback: They apologise and refund the delivery charge.
